summary: SKILL.md for simple_site correctly transforms CLAUDE.md.template by adding YAML frontmatter, removing platform-specific sections (Идея with PROJECT_IDEA placeholder, Домен with u{USERID}.habab.ru), and preserving all technical content including Безопасность, Генерация сайтов, AI-фоны, i18n, Правила, and Первые шаги. No internal references (localhost, IPs, habab.ru) remain in the output file.
